29.reason: [The 'if(flag==0)' block is inside the inner loop, causing multiple additions of the same segment to hx/hy/ex/ey arrays when flag remains 0 during early iterations of j. It should be outside the inner j-loop to ensure each segment is added at most once as a candidate starting point.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The 'if(flag==0)' block is inside the inner loop, causing multiple additions of the same segment to hx/hy/ex/ey arrays when flag remains 0 during early iterations of j.
